planMd:
# Plan: Add Study Links Tab for User Saved Items

## Summary

Research and plan implementation of a new tab to store user-saved study links and related items

## Tasks

1. Analyze existing saved items storage and retrieval in extension
2. Research UI patterns for adding a new tab in the extension popup (depends on: Analyze existing saved items storage and retrieval in extension)
3. Investigate existing user data models and storage for user-generated content (depends on: Analyze existing saved items storage and retrieval in extension)
4. Define data model and storage schema for study links tab (depends on: Investigate existing user data models and storage for user-generated content)
5. Design UI component for Study Links tab in extension popup (depends on: Research UI patterns for adding a new tab in the extension popup, Define data model and storage schema for study links tab)
6. Plan integration of Study Links tab with existing saved items and storage APIs (depends on: Analyze existing saved items storage and retrieval in extension, Investigate existing user data models and storage for user-generated content, Define data model and storage schema for study links tab)
7. Document user interaction flows for Study Links tab (depends on: Design UI component for Study Links tab in extension popup)
